signatures: modify(primitiveId: string | IPCB_PrimitiveArc, property: {         net?: string;         layer?: TPCB_LayersOfLine;         startX?: number;         startY?: number;         endX?: number;         endY?: number;         arcAngle?: number;         lineWidth?: number;         interactiveMode?: EPCB_PrimitiveArcInteractiveMode;         primitiveLock?: boolean;     }): Promise<IPCB_PrimitiveArc | undefined>
classSummary: PCB & 封装 / 圆弧线图元类

params.name: property
params.type: { net?: string; layer?: TPCB\_LayersOfLine ; startX?: number; startY?: number; endX?: number; endY?: number; arcAngle?: number; lineWidth?: number; interactiveMode?: EPCB\_PrimitiveArcInteractiveMode ; primitiveLock?: boolean; }

exampleNotes: 修改案例会先创建一个临时图元，再构造一个最小但真实的 property 对象执行 modify，最后自动清理。
